title: SunPathPlotCommand
description: SunPathPlotCommand: Command that when used in conjunction with the LadybugToolsAdapter, will plot a sun path based off of the location data in an EPW file.

EPWFile.description: The EPW file to use for analysis. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

SunSize.description: The size of the sun on the plot.

OutputLocation.description: The location to place any images generated by the command. Leave empty to return a base64 string representation of the image.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
